intentSynonyms: look up restaurant awards in tripadvisor
fetch a single restaurant awards in tripadvisor
view one specific restaurant awards in tripadvisor
get michelin and other awards in tripadvisor
description: Get MICHELIN Guide awards and other accolades for a restaurant. Returns award details including stars, Bib Gourmand status, and MICHELIN review text. Requires the restaurant location ID.

location_id.description: Restaurant location ID (from search or listing)
